name: proto-buying
description: Read-only live POSWINSQL stock and sales data for Proto buying analysis.

interface.shortDescription: Live read-only stock and sales for buying
interface.longDescription: Connects Proto Buying Analyst to approved read-only POSWINSQL stock and monthly unit-sales operations. It cannot create, change, submit or send supplier orders.
defaultPrompt: Analyse these SKUs against live Proto sales and stock.
Check live stock and 24 months of sales for this order.
